creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text:
I wasn't able to replicate this in a 10.1-RELEASE jail.  What does `sha256 /lib/libthr.so.3` say?  Was this system an upgrade or fresh install?

...
[test-jail] [1/1] Installing mod_php56-5.6.11...
[test-jail] [1/1] Extracting mod_php56-5.6.11: 100%
[activating module `php5' in /usr/local/etc/apache24/httpd.conf]
Message for mod_php56-5.6.11:

# freebsd-version
10.1-RELEASE-p16

# sha256 /lib/libthr.so.3 
SHA256 (/lib/libthr.so.3) = 5d3b084891bf044cb4e626e9c0e22faccbdc36f21b64344b523fe2b314a95f21
